author: y4rr
content: Result: Added GPU PTX kernels for SiLU (forward+backward), ELU (forward+backward with alpha param), Mish (forward+backward with softplus stability branch). All 6 kernels use ex2.approx/rcp.approx for fast exp/div. Backend trait methods, CudaBackendImpl overrides, and activation.rs GPU dispatch all wired up. All 3200+ tests pass.
